title: **Fix**: Resolved license activation check issue by improving class existence validation.
title: **Fix**: Fixed broken link in the upgrade modal.
title: **Update**: Improved Inspector Controls for a more intuitive and user-friendly experience.
title: **Update**: Redesigned and modernized admin dashboard interface.
title: **New**: Added contextual info notes to explain advanced settings and features.
title: **New**: Introduced new popup animation types: Zoom, Flip, and Bounce.
title: **New**: Added Backdrop blur control  support
title: **New**: Added Configurable animation duration(ms)
title: **New**: Added Animation easing presets
title: **Update**: Improved validation for custom trigger and smart trigger selectors (class/ID input).
title: **Update**: Enhanced user guidance for Custom Trigger and Smart Auto Trigger options.
title: **Fix**: Prevented invalid selector errors from breaking the editor.
title: **Refactor**: Removed unnecessary and duplicate logic to improve performance and maintainability.
title: **New:** Added ripple effect support to the trigger button.
title: **New:** Added support for custom close button icons and position controls.
title: **New:** Extended popup header options with background control, visibility toggle, and title position settings.
title: **Update:** Renamed Trigger Button PanelBody Title for better clarity.
title: **Update:** Moved trigger button alignment control to block settings.
title: Fix: Close button icon visibility.
Initial Release.
